'use strict'; const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; function notFoundError(original, syscall) { return Object.assign(new Error(`${syscall} ${original.command} ENOENT`), { code: 'ENOENT', errno: 'ENOENT', syscall: `${syscall} ${original.command}`, path: original.command, spawnargs: original.args, }); } function hookChildProcess(cp, parsed) { if (!isWin) { return; } const originalEmit = cp.emit; cp.emit = function (name, arg1) { // If emitting "exit" event and exit code is 1, we need to check if // the command exists and emit an "error" instead // See https://github.com/IndigoUnited/node-cross-spawn/issues/16 if (name === 'exit') { const err = verifyENOENT(arg1, parsed); if (err) { return originalEmit.call(cp, 'error', err); } } return originalEmit.apply(cp, arguments); // eslint-disable-line prefer-rest-params }; } function verifyENOENT(status, parsed) { if (isWin && status === 1 && !parsed.file) { return notFoundError(parsed.original, 'spawn'); } return null; } function verifyENOENTSync(status, parsed) { if (isWin && status === 1 && !parsed.file) { return notFoundError(parsed.original, 'spawnSync'); } return null; } module.exports = { hookChildProcess, verifyENOENT, verifyENOENTSync, notFoundError, };
